name: Kurogane Kosakusho Ltd.
summary: Kurogane Kosakusho Ltd. manufactures and sells furniture for office work, facilities, home, and residential use. The company also manufactures and sells air conditioning and clean-room-related equipment. In addition, it manufactures and installs custom-made interiors and construction-related equipment. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
